'''zhadhojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabasa|cabasa]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-dh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabasa|cabasa]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhadhojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhædhejeth|zhædhejeth]] || [[word:zhædhejej|zhædhejej]] || [[word:zhædhejesh|zhædhejesh]] || [[word:zhædheje|zhædheje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhadhodhojoth|zhadhodhojoth]] || [[word:zhadhodhojoj|zhadhodhojoj]] || [[word:zhadhodhojosh|zhadhodhojosh]] || [[word:zhadhodhojo|zhadhodhojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhadhojoth|zhadhojoth]] || [[word:zhadhojoj|zhadhojoj]] || [[word:zhadhojosh|zhadhojosh]] || [[word:zhadhojo|zhadhojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhadhofjoth|zhadhofjoth]] || [[word:zhadhofjoj|zhadhofjoj]] || [[word:zhadhofjosh|zhadhofjosh]] || [[word:zhadhofjof|zhadhofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhadhojotho|zhadhojotho]] || [[word:zhadhojojo|zhadhojojo]] || [[word:zhadhojosho|zhadhojosho]] || [[word:zhadhojoko|zhadhojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhadhojoth|zhadhojoth]] || [[word:zhadhojoj|zhadhojoj]] || [[word:zhadhojosh|zhadhojosh]] || [[word:zhadhojo|zhadhojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhadhojothol|zhadhojothol]] || [[word:zhadhojojol|zhadhojojol]] || [[word:zhadhojoshol|zhadhojoshol]] || [[word:zhadhojokol|zhadhojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhadhojothotho|zhadhojothotho]] || [[word:zhadhojojojo|zhadhojojojo]] || [[word:zhadhojoshosho|zhadhojoshosho]] || [[word:zhadhojoko|zhadhojoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhadhojothon|zhadhojothon]] || [[word:zhadhojojon|zhadhojojon]] || [[word:zhadhojoshon|zhadhojoshon]] || [[word:zhadhojokon|zhadhojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhadhojothoro|zhadhojothoro]] || [[word:zhadhojojoro|zhadhojojoro]] || [[word:zhadhojoshoro|zhadhojoshoro]] || [[word:zhadhojokoro|zhadhojokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
